Registry / Terms / adjustment device

adjustment device

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02051 · 10 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 9 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

9 distinct definitions across 10 publications. 1 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical202X2010
device incorporated in the meter, that only allows shifting of the error curve generally parallel to itself, with a view to bringing errors within the maximum permissible errors
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
202X2018OIML R139-1:20183.2.1002844pending
20102007OIML R 139:2007T.1.1001998pending

8 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20102006OIML R 137-1:20062.1.801931
device incorporated in the gas meter that only allows the error curve to be shifted generally parallel to itself, with a view to bringing errors (of indication) within the limits of the maximum permissible error (MPE)
pending
202X2007OIML R 140:2007T.1.11.102051
device incorporated in the meter that only allows shifting of the relative error curve generally parallel to itself, with a view to bringing errors within the maximum permissible errors and to et the weighted mean error (see T.2.20) at minimum
pending
20102007OIML R 140:2007T.1.11.102051
device incorporated in the meter that only allows shifting of the relative error curve generally parallel to itself, with a view to bringing errors within the maximum permissible errors and to set the weighted mean error (see T.2.20) at minimum
pending
202X2019OIML R117-1:2019T.a.302843
device incorporated in the meter, that only allows shifting of the error curve generally parallel to itself, with a view to bringing errors within the maximum permissible errors. This device may be either mechanical or electronic
pending
20102007OIML R 117-1:2007T.a.301529
device incorporated in the meter, that only allows shifting of the error curve generally parallel to itself, with a view to bringing errors within the maximum permissible errors. This device may beeither mechanical or electronic
pending
20102006OIML R 49-1:20062.1.600416
device incorporated in the meter, that only allows the error curve tobe shifted generally parallel to itself, with a view to bringing errors (of indication) within the maximum permissible errors
pending
202X2012OIML R046-1:20122.1.1802297-R046-1
device or function incorporated in the meter that allows the error curve to be shifted with a view to bringing errors (of indication) within the maximum permissible errors
pending
202X2024OIML R049-1:20243.1.602345-R049-1
part of the meter that allows an adjustment of the meter such that the error curve of the meter is generally shifted parallel to itself to fit in the envelope of the maximum permissible error(s) (3.2.5)
pending
